name: user-management
//: No npm workspaces on purpose: this repo lives on an exFAT drive, which cannot hold the symlinks/junctions npm & pnpm workspaces require. Each app keeps its own node_modules; the root only orchestrates.

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix apps/api --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix apps/web --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix apps/api run start" "npm --prefix apps/web run start"
